ingredients.alim_nom_eng: Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added
Salt, white (sea, igneous or rock), iodine added, no fluride added

ingredients_text: HOMMUS (82%) [COOKED CHICKPEA (53%), TAHINI (SESAME), WATER, CANOLA OIL, VEGETABLE PROTEIN, JALAPENO (3.5%), ACID (CITRIC ACID), SALT, GARLIC, PRESERVATIVE (202)], CRACKERS (18%) (RICE, CORN FLOUR, RICE BRAN, INULIN, LINSEEDS, VEGETABLE OIL, CHIA SEEDS, SALT).
